symptoms: runny nose,sneezing,sore throat,cough,mild fever,congestion
advice: Rest, fluids, and over-the-counter cold medicine usually help. See a doctor if symptoms last more than 10 days.

symptoms: fever,chills,muscle aches,fatigue,cough,headache,sore throat
advice: Rest and hydrate. See a doctor if fever is high, persistent, or you have trouble breathing.

symptoms: headache,nausea,sensitivity to light,sensitivity to sound,visual aura,throbbing pain
advice: Rest in a dark quiet room. See a doctor if this is a new or unusually severe headache.

symptoms: nausea,vomiting,diarrhea,stomach pain,fever,dehydration
advice: Stay hydrated with fluids and electrolytes. Seek care if you can't keep fluids down or see blood in stool.

symptoms: sneezing,itchy eyes,runny nose,nasal congestion,itchy throat
advice: Antihistamines often help. See a doctor if symptoms are persistent or affect daily life.

symptoms: shortness of breath,wheezing,chest tightness,cough,difficulty breathing
advice: Use prescribed inhaler if available. Seek emergency care if breathing difficulty is severe.

symptoms: burning urination,frequent urination,pelvic pain,cloudy urine,urgency to urinate
advice: See a doctor soon for antibiotics. Seek urgent care if fever or back pain develops.

symptoms: sore throat,fever,swollen lymph nodes,difficulty swallowing,red tonsils
advice: See a doctor for testing; antibiotics may be needed to prevent complications.

symptoms: cough,fever,chills,shortness of breath,chest pain,fatigue
advice: Seek medical attention promptly, especially if breathing is difficult or lips/face turn bluish.

symptoms: abdominal pain,nausea,vomiting,fever,loss of appetite,pain near navel
advice: Seek emergency care immediately, especially if pain is severe or localized to the lower right abdomen.

symptoms: itchy rash,fever,fatigue,loss of appetite,blister like bumps
advice: Rest, avoid scratching, and stay hydrated. See a doctor if rash spreads to eyes or signs of infection appear.

symptoms: red eyes,itchy eyes,watery eyes,eye discharge,gritty feeling in eye
advice: Avoid touching eyes and wash hands often. See a doctor if vision is affected or pain is severe.

symptoms: facial pain,nasal congestion,headache,thick nasal discharge,reduced sense of smell
advice: Rest and hydration usually help. See a doctor if symptoms persist beyond 10 days or fever develops.

symptoms: headache,dizziness,blurred vision,nosebleeds,shortness of breath
advice: Monitor blood pressure and see a doctor for evaluation, especially if symptoms are new or severe.

symptoms: frequent urination,excessive thirst,fatigue,blurred vision,slow healing sores
advice: See a doctor for blood sugar testing and evaluation.

symptoms: fatigue,pale skin,shortness of breath,dizziness,cold hands and feet
advice: See a doctor for blood tests to determine the cause and appropriate treatment.

symptoms: excessive worry,restlessness,rapid heartbeat,difficulty concentrating,trouble sleeping
advice: Consider speaking with a mental health professional. Seek urgent help if you feel unsafe.

symptoms: persistent sadness,loss of interest,fatigue,sleep changes,difficulty concentrating
advice: Consider speaking with a mental health professional. Seek urgent help if you have thoughts of self-harm.

symptoms: chest pain,shortness of breath,pain radiating to arm,cold sweat,nausea,lightheadedness
advice: Call emergency services immediately. This can be life-threatening.

symptoms: sudden numbness,confusion,trouble speaking,vision loss,severe headache,loss of balance
advice: Call emergency services immediately. Fast treatment is critical.

symptoms: nausea,vomiting,diarrhea,stomach cramps,fever,weakness
advice: Stay hydrated. Seek care if symptoms are severe, prolonged, or you notice blood in vomit or stool.

symptoms: persistent cough,mucus production,fatigue,mild fever,chest discomfort
advice: Rest and fluids usually help. See a doctor if cough lasts more than 3 weeks or breathing worsens.

symptoms: itchy skin,dry skin,red patches,skin rash,cracked skin
advice: Moisturize regularly and avoid irritants. See a doctor if it becomes infected or doesn't improve.

symptoms: sore throat,swollen tonsils,fever,difficulty swallowing,bad breath
advice: See a doctor for evaluation; may require antibiotics if bacterial.

symptoms: dizziness,spinning sensation,balance problems,nausea,unsteadiness
advice: See a doctor if episodes are frequent, severe, or accompanied by hearing loss.
